name: Garden Scramble
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red bell pepper, finely chopped
2 slice White or whole wheat bread, toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine egg substitute, pepper and marjoram; set aside.
2. Spray a nonstick skillet with cooking spray over medium heat.
3. Cook celery, red pepper, green pepper and chives in chicken broth until tender.
4. Add the egg substitute mixture to the vegetables. Stir occasionally until set.
5. Sprinkle shredded cheese on top and cook for an additional minute or two until melted and cooked through.
6. Serve immediately with toasted bread slices if desired, or serve plain.
